description_long: This is an old, thick hardcover book with a worn black cover and visible signs of age and use. The edges of the cover are frayed, and the spine shows significant damage, with the inner binding and some pages exposed. The cover is mostly plain, with only faint gold text visible on the front. The pages appear yellowed and aged, suggesting the book is quite old. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the cover, giving it a utilitarian and scholarly appearance. The book's overall condition suggests it has been handled frequently and may have historical or archival value.
description: A thick, worn black hardcover book with frayed edges, exposed spine, and faint gold text on the front. The cover is plain and aged, with no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: The book is seen from an angled side, highlighting the damaged spine with exposed binding and a mostly plain black cover.
description_view_1: This view shows the front cover with faint gold text and the book's thickness, as well as the worn edges and slightly warped cover.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, showing a plain, black, and heavily worn surface with frayed corners and yellowed page edges.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the spine is shown, again emphasizing the exposed binding and the book's overall aged condition.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black and heavily worn, with exposed binding and no visible decorative elements or text. The damage obscures any original design.
